subcodes.title: Suriy-i-Bayan
subcodes.first_line: The remembrance of the name of thy Lord by His servant, when he entered the Garden of Paradise, the seat whereupon shone forth the lights of the Face from the Dayspring [3.5s]... ...Say: Doth it beseem a man while claiming to be a follower of his Lord, the All-Merciful, he should yet in his heart do the very deeds of the Evil One?
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر اسم ربک عبده اذ دخل بقعه الفردوس مقر الذی استشرقت علیه انوار الوجه عن مشرق
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @exhortations and counsels, @assistance to the poor and lowly; the orphan; the sick
